title: No per-message timestamps in conversation thread
description: Individual messages within a conversation thread do not display timestamps. Users cannot see when each message was sent or received. Timestamps are only shown on sidebar conversation entries (e.g., 'Mar 21 at 9:15 PM') for the overall session, not per message.
steps: Look at individual user and assistant messages
Observe: no timestamp is shown on any message
expected: Each message should display a timestamp (or at least a relative time like '2 hours ago')
actual: No timestamps on individual messages. Only sidebar shows session-level timestamps.

title: Scroll focus ambiguity between sidebar and message area
description: When scrolling with the mouse wheel or keyboard, the scroll target can be ambiguous. Sometimes the sidebar scrolls instead of the message area, depending on where the cursor/focus is. This can be disorienting when trying to scroll through a long conversation.
steps: Open a conversation with long content
Try scrolling with mouse wheel or keyboard arrows
Observe: scroll may target sidebar instead of message area
expected: Scroll should consistently target the message area when a conversation is open
actual: Scroll target depends on cursor position / focus state

title: Cannot verify thinking block and tool call rendering (no test data)
description: The available conversations in the test environment do not contain thinking blocks (extended thinking) or explicit tool_use/tool_result message parts. As a result, these rendering features could not be verified. The workspace conversation showed structured content with checkmarks but not explicit tool call UI. Need conversations with extended thinking and tool use to fully validate STORY-012.
steps: No conversations contained thinking blocks or tool_use content blocks
expected: Test data should include conversations with thinking blocks and tool calls
actual: Only simple text/markdown conversations available for testing

title: Message rendering works correctly — markdown, avatars, role labels all functional
description: The previously-blocking ChatPage crash has been fixed. Conversations now render correctly with: user/assistant message separation, avatar icons, role labels ('You' / 'Claude'), rich markdown (h2/h3 headings, bullet lists, ordered lists, bold text, horizontal rules, paragraphs), suggestion buttons, tab system, and reply input. All rendering is clean with no visual glitches or errors.
